nasb.text: “How beautiful you are, my darling, How beautiful you are! Your eyes are like doves behind your veil; Your hair is like a flock of goats That have descended from Mount Gilead.

esv.text: Behold, you are beautiful, my love, behold, you are beautiful! Your eyes are doves behind your veil. Your hair is like a flock of goats leaping down the slopes of Gilead.

cnv.text: 我的佳偶啊！你很美麗； 你很美麗。 你的眼在面紗後面好像鴿子的眼睛； 頭髮如同從基列山下來的山羊群。

ccb.text: 我的爱人啊，你真是美极了！ 面纱掩映着那温柔如鸽的双眸， 你的秀发就好像跃下基列山冈的山羊群。
